info.title: State Department Consular Affairs Data API
info.description: Public REST API providing travel advisories for all countries, country travel information, and passport acceptance facility locations. The API is hosted at cadataapi.state.gov and requires no authentication.

contact.name: US Department of State Consular Affairs

servers.description: State Department Consular Affairs Data API

get.description: Returns current travel advisories for all countries worldwide. Each advisory includes the country name, alert level (1-4), publication date, last updated timestamp, and detailed summary of risks including crime, terrorism, health threats, civil unrest, and kidnapping.

200.description: Array of travel advisory objects for all countries

example.Title: Nigeria - Level 3: Reconsider Travel
example.Summary: Reconsider travel to Nigeria due to crime, terrorism, civil unrest, kidnapping, and maritime crime.

get.summary: Get travel advisory by country code
get.description: Returns the current travel advisory for a specific country identified by its two-letter ISO country code. Includes alert level (1-4), risk summary, and key risk categories.

parameters.name: countryCode
parameters.description: Two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g., NG for Nigeria, FR for France)

200.description: Travel advisory for the specified country

example.Title: Niger - Level 4: Do Not Travel
example.Summary: The U.S. State Department advises against all travel to Niger due to multiple critical threats.

get.summary: Get travel information for all countries
get.description: Returns detailed travel information for all countries, including transportation, entry/exit requirements, local laws, health guidance, safety and security advisories, destination descriptions, and embassy/consulate contact information. All content fields are HTML-formatted.

200.description: Array of country travel information objects

get.summary: Get travel information for a specific country
get.description: Returns detailed travel information for a specific country identified by its two-letter country code tag. Includes transportation, entry/exit requirements, local laws, health guidance, safety and security advisories, destination descriptions, and embassy/consulate contact information.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Two-letter country code (e.g., AF for Afghanistan, FR for France)

200.description: Country travel information for the specified country

get.summary: Get a specific field of travel information for a country
get.description: Returns a specific field of travel information for a country identified by its two-letter code. Useful for retrieving only the relevant section (e.g., health, safety_and_security) without fetching the full record.

parameters.name: field
parameters.description: Field name to retrieve (e.g., health, safety_and_security, entry_exit_requirements)

200.description: Requested field value for the specified country

get.summary: Get all passport acceptance facility locations
get.description: Returns a list of all passport acceptance facility locations in the United States, including postal facilities, courts, municipal offices, and libraries. Each record includes address, contact information, geographic coordinates, and operating hours.

200.description: Array of passport acceptance facility location objects

get.summary: Get passport acceptance facility locations by state
get.description: Returns passport acceptance facility locations filtered by US state code. Each record includes facility name, address, contact information, geographic coordinates, facility type, and operating hours.

parameters.name: stateCode
parameters.description: Two-letter US state abbreviation (e.g., MD, CA, TX)

200.description: Array of passport acceptance facility locations in the specified state

get.summary: Get passport acceptance facility locations by ZIP code
get.description: Returns passport acceptance facility locations near a specified ZIP code.

200.description: Array of passport acceptance facility locations near the specified ZIP code

get.summary: Get passport acceptance facility locations by ZIP code and radius
get.description: Returns passport acceptance facility locations within a specified radius (in miles) of a given ZIP code.

200.description: Array of passport acceptance facility locations within the specified radius

get.summary: Get passport acceptance facility locations by geographic coordinates
get.description: Returns passport acceptance facility locations near specified geographic coordinates (latitude,longitude).

200.description: Array of passport acceptance facility locations near the specified coordinates

TravelAdvisory.description: A country travel advisory issued by the US Department of State

Title.description: Advisory title including country name and warning level (e.g., 'Nigeria - Level 3: Reconsider Travel')

Link.description: URL to the full advisory page on travel.state.gov

Category.description: Array of two-letter ISO country codes associated with this advisory

Summary.description: HTML-formatted summary of the advisory including risk categories such as crime, terrorism, health threats, civil unrest, and kidnapping
Summary.example: Reconsider travel to Nigeria due to crime, terrorism, civil unrest, kidnapping, and maritime crime.

id.description: Unique identifier for the advisory, typically the same as the Link URL

Published.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the advisory was first published

Updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update to the advisory

allOf.description: Extended travel advisory with additional detail fields returned for single-country queries

Advisory_Level.description: Numeric alert level: 1=Exercise Normal Precautions, 2=Exercise Increased Caution, 3=Reconsider Travel, 4=Do Not Travel

Key_Risks.description: Array of key risk categories associated with the advisory

CountryTravelInformation.description: Comprehensive travel information for a country as published by the US Department of State

geopoliticalarea.description: Full country or geopolitical area name

travel_transportation.description: HTML-formatted content covering road conditions, aviation safety, traffic regulations, and transportation options

entry_exit_requirements.description: HTML-formatted content detailing passport and visa requirements, dual nationality rules, and registration requirements
entry_exit_requirements.example: A valid passport and visa are required to enter Afghanistan...

local_laws_and_special_circumstances.description: HTML-formatted content on criminal penalties, religious restrictions, laws affecting travelers including women and LGBTQ+ travelers

health.description: HTML-formatted content on emergency medical services, hospital facilities, recommended vaccinations, food and water safety

safety_and_security.description: HTML-formatted content on terrorism threats, kidnapping risks, crime levels, civil demonstrations, and security conditions

destination_description.description: HTML-formatted general description of the destination with link to State Department fact sheet
destination_description.example: For more information, visit the State Department fact sheet...

travel_embassyAndConsulate.description: HTML-formatted embassy and consulate contact information including address, phone, and email
travel_embassyAndConsulate.example: U.S. Embassy Kabul (operations suspended as of August 31, 2021)

last_update_date.description: Date the record was last updated in the format 'Last Updated: Month DD, YYYY'

PassportLocation.description: A passport acceptance facility location in the United States

FacilityName.description: Official name of the passport acceptance facility. May contain '#N/A' if data is unavailable.

StreetAddress.description: Physical street address of the facility

City.description: City where the facility is located

ZipCode.description: US postal code of the facility

PhoneNumber.description: Contact phone number. May contain '#N/A' if data is unavailable.

Latitude.description: Geographic latitude coordinate of the facility

Longitude.description: Geographic longitude coordinate of the facility

FacilityTypeCode.description: Single-letter code indicating facility type: G=Postal, A=Court, E=Municipal, C=Library

EmailContact.description: Contact email address for the facility

HourComment.description: Operating hours and appointment requirements for the facility

tags.name: Travel Advisories
tags.description: Current US Department of State travel advisories for countries worldwide, with alert levels ranging from 1 (Exercise Normal Precautions) to 4 (Do Not Travel)

tags.name: Country Information
tags.description: Detailed country-specific travel information covering transportation, entry requirements, local laws, health, safety, and embassy contacts

tags.name: Passport Locations
tags.description: Passport acceptance facility locations across the United States, searchable by state, ZIP code, radius, or geographic coordinates
